announcement.label: Announcement
announcement.text: AI assistant in LeadLab — smarter lead and deal management.

hero.title: Win more customers and keep every deal in one place.
hero.subtitle: LeadLab brings records, pipeline, tasks, and proposals into one calm workspace where every lead has a clear next step.
hero.note: No credit card • Set up in 2 minutes
hero.socialProof: Built for growing service teams in Europe and beyond.

trustStrip.trustedBy: Built for service teams and growing companies.

benefits.title: What you get
benefits.subtitle: A few concrete outcomes you will notice in the first week.

cards.title: Fewer forgotten leads
cards.description: Every inquiry has an owner, context, and a clear next step.

cards.title: Faster proposals
cards.description: Draft an offer in minutes and see when the client opens it.

cards.title: A calmer week
cards.description: Agenda and pipeline in one place, with no spreadsheet chaos.

cards.title: In control
cards.description: Roles, permissions, and an audit trail aligned with GDPR.

workflow.title: How LeadLab works
workflow.subtitle: Four steps from inquiry to signed proposal.

steps.title: Capture leads in seconds
steps.description: Save an inquiry with source, contact, and context — no copy-pasting between tools.

steps.title: Qualify with context
steps.description: Add value, probability, and next steps right where everything else lives.

steps.title: Send proposals that don't get lost
steps.description: Draft an offer, send it, and track its status through to signature.

steps.title: Deliver on time
steps.description: Tasks and checkpoints make sure what you promised actually ships.

features.title: Everything for daily lead work
features.subtitle: The features your team actually uses — without the bloat.

cards.title: Customer records
cards.description: Contacts, companies, and activity history in one place.

cards.title: Tasks & reminders
cards.description: Assign work, set due dates, and never miss a follow-up.

cards.title: Proposals & offers
cards.description: Draft proposals and track them all the way to signature.

cards.title: Permissions
cards.description: Control access by role, team, or category.

cards.title: Agenda
cards.description: Calendar of tasks, checkpoints, and deadlines at a glance.

cards.title: Pipeline overview
cards.description: Stages, totals, and next steps without switching tools.

split.title: See exactly where every deal is stuck
split.description: Drag-and-drop stages, value totals, and next steps for the whole team — no spreadsheets, no guessing.

integrations.title: Works with the tools you already use
integrations.subtitle: Connect LeadLab to common tools with no code.

why.title: Why LeadLab over spreadsheets or email
why.subtitle: Three reasons managers switch.

bullets.title: One source of truth
bullets.description: No more stale spreadsheets and eight versions of a proposal in your inbox.

bullets.title: See the next step, not just history
bullets.description: Instead of notes about what happened, you have the next step ready.

bullets.title: The team knows who does what
bullets.description: Roles, owners, and permissions without manual policing.

testimonials.title: What customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Sample feedback from teams that use LeadLab every day.

items.quote: We finally see who owns each lead and what the next step is. Our meetings got cut in half.
items.name: Petra K.

items.quote: A proposal that used to take an hour is ready in minutes. And the pipeline finally makes sense.
items.name: Tomas H.

items.quote: The move from spreadsheets was quick. The team got used to it in a week and we have peace of mind.
items.name: Marketa D.

quiz.title: Take the quick quiz
quiz.subtitle: Three questions on the key areas. See how much time LeadLab saves you and where your biggest gaps are.
quiz.finishedText: Create an account and see how LeadLab solves your specific bottlenecks.

questions.q: Where does your team track sales opportunities?
options: We don't have a single system

questions.q: How often does a lead go cold because it slipped your mind?
How many people on your team work with leads?

webinars.title: Join a free webinar
webinars.subtitle: We'll walk you through the recommended LeadLab setup, team rollout, and answer your questions.

items.title: Working efficiently with pipeline and proposals

demo.title: Free online LeadLab demo
demo.subtitle: Book a no-strings-attached online session. We'll walk through your processes and show how LeadLab fits in.
bullets: Answers to all your questions, even the basics
Review of your current setup and concrete suggestions
Quick hands-on tour of the key features
demo.note: No spam. Data is only used to schedule the demo.

platforms.title: LeadLab available anywhere
platforms.subtitle: Mac, Windows, iPhone, iPad, Android and the web. LeadLab is ready wherever you are.

trust.title: For owners, managers, and teams
trust.subtitle: For service businesses that want clarity without complexity.

segments.title: Team leads
segments.description: Assign work and keep priorities clear.

segments.title: Teams
segments.description: Share tasks, proposals, and client notes.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free and upgrade when you need more.

cta.title: Ready to bring order to your customer work?
cta.subtitle: Set up your workspace and invite your team in minutes.

items.a: Yes. The Free plan includes core CRM features for small teams and stays free.
Yes. You can import contacts and records from CSV at any time.
Assign roles and set access by team, category, or specific record.
Yes. LeadLab is open-source and runs on Docker Compose in your own infrastructure.

items.q: Can we export our data anytime?
items.a: Yes. You can export records, contacts, and proposals to CSV. Your data stays yours.
Yes. You can change or cancel your plan in workspace settings, with no commitment.
The interface is available in Czech, English, German, and Polish.

auth.brandingTagline: Your CRM for modern sales teams.
auth.brandingDescription: Manage leads, track deals, and close more with LeadLab.

dashboard.setupBannerText: You're almost ready! Complete the onboarding steps to get the most out of LeadLab.
dashboard.dragToReorder: Drag to reorder · toggle to show/hide
dashboard.myTopRecordsEmpty: You have no active records yet.
dashboard.categoryOverviewEmpty: No active categories. Set up your pipeline first.
dashboard.myDayEmpty: No tasks or checkpoints due today. Great job!
dashboard.upcomingCheckpointsEmpty: No upcoming checkpoints in the next 14 days.
dashboard.pipelineTrendEmpty: No data for the selected interval.
dashboard.teamLeaderboardForbidden: This section is available to managers only.
dashboard.tourWelcomeBody: Your new dashboard is fully customisable. This quick tour will show you where to find everything.
dashboard.tourKpiBody: At the top you'll find key metrics – total records, pipeline value and open tasks. Below that, a tile for each category with a quick summary.
dashboard.tourFunnelBody: The funnel shows how many records are in each stage of the selected category. The trend widget tracks value and activity over time.
dashboard.tourMyDayBody: The 'My Day' widget gathers today's tasks, upcoming checkpoint deadlines and overdue items. Records without recent activity appear in 'Stale Records'.
dashboard.tourAnalyticsBody: The activity heatmap, win/loss overview and team leaderboard give you a comprehensive view of company performance.
dashboard.tourCustomiseBody: Click 'Customise layout' to drag widgets, show or hide them. Set the global data range with the toggle next to the button.
dashboard.qcColdCallHint: Start with a phone number – other fields are optional.
dashboard.focusNextEmpty: Great job! No records waiting for contact.
dashboard.recentWinsEmpty: No wins in the last 30 days yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.failedToStartCheckout: Failed to start checkout. Please try again.

settings.proProText: Your workspace is on the Pro plan. To manage or cancel your subscription, please contact support or visit the Stripe customer portal.
settings.apiTokensDesc: Generate bearer tokens to authenticate API requests. Store them securely — they are shown only once.
settings.tokenCreatedBanner: Token created — copy it now. It will not be shown again.
settings.webhooksDesc: Receive signed POST requests when CRM events occur. Leave the events field empty to subscribe to all events.
settings.calendarFeedDesc: Subscribe to your tasks in any calendar app (Google Calendar, Outlook, Apple Calendar) using an iCal feed.
settings.calendarFeedReadOnly: Add this URL as a subscribed calendar. The feed is read-only.
settings.notificationsDesc: Manage email and push notification preferences for this workspace.
settings.weeklyDigestDesc: A summary email with pipeline stats, sent every Monday.
settings.browserPushDesc: Receive alerts when a task is due or a new record is assigned to you.
settings.brandingDesc: Customise the logo and brand colour for your workspace. Available on Pro.
settings.upgradeToBranding: Upgrade to Pro to unlock white-label branding.
settings.leadScoringDesc: Configure weighted rules to auto-score incoming records based on field values. Higher score = higher priority.
settings.noRules: No rules yet. Add your first rule below.
settings.avatarFormat: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP — max 20 MB
settings.deleteWorkspacePrompt: This will permanently delete the {name} workspace and all its data. Type the workspace name to confirm.
settings.feedReadOnly: Add this URL as a subscribed calendar. The feed is read-only.

settings.browserPushSubtitle: Receive alerts when a task is due or a new record is assigned to you.
settings.upgradeForBranding: Upgrade to Pro to unlock white-label branding.
settings.leadScoringDesc2: Configure weighted rules that compute a 0–100 score for each record.
settings.noRulesYet: No rules yet. Add your first rule below.
settings.transferOwnershipDesc: Transfer workspace ownership to another member. They will receive a confirmation email and have 48 hours to accept.
settings.transferOwnershipSent: Transfer request sent. The new owner will receive a confirmation email.
settings.transferOwnershipLinkInvalid: This transfer link is invalid, expired, or has already been used.

pipeline.rulesTemplateContactRecommendedName: Warn when contact person is missing
pipeline.rulesTemplateContactRecommendedDescripti: Shows warning on stage change if no contact person is selected.
pipeline.rulesTemplateHighValueDescription: Blocks stage change when record value is below 1,000.
pipeline.rulesTemplateRecentActivityDescription: Blocks stage change when no note activity exists in the last 7 days.
pipeline.rulesTemplateReviewRecommendationDescrip: Adds recommendation when status is new and notes are missing.
pipeline.rulesTemplateReviewRecommendationMessage: Recommended to add notes before moving forward.

pipeline.rulesBuilderValidationInvalidTimeWindow: Time window must contain last_hours or last_days.

toolHelp.comment: Free-form comment on the record. Use {'@'} to mention a teammate.
toolHelp.call: Log a call that already happened — duration, notes, optional recording.
toolHelp.meeting: Log a meeting that already happened, with notes and duration.
toolHelp.meeting_scheduled: A scheduled future meeting — start, location, attendees.
toolHelp.call_scheduled: A scheduled future call — date, time, contact.
toolHelp.event_scheduled: Generic calendar event (workshop, webinar, anniversary…) — date, time or all-day, location, attendees, description.
toolHelp.email_out: An outbound email — stored on the timeline and optionally sent via integration.
toolHelp.email_in: Manually log an inbound email (e.g. when not coming through an integration).
toolHelp.chat: Log a chat message (Slack, Teams, …) sent or received.
toolHelp.mention: Notify a team member by mentioning them on this record.
toolHelp.checklist: Interactive checklist attached to this record.
toolHelp.time_logged: Log time spent on this record — minutes, optional description, start/end timestamps.
toolHelp.approval_requested: Request approval from a team member.
toolHelp.approval_resolved: Record the outcome of an approval request.
toolHelp.link: A saved external link with title and description (contract, doc, website…).
toolHelp.file_upload: File — upload directly from disk, drag-and-drop, or paste a URL. We can fetch and store it for you, or just keep the link.
toolHelp.voice_memo: Voice memo — record audio with your microphone; you can pause, save, or discard. Filename and duration are stored for you.
toolHelp.payment_received: Log a payment received for this record.
toolHelp.invoice_sent: Log an invoice sent to the contact.
toolHelp.signature_requested: Log a signature request sent for a document.
toolHelp.system_note: System-style note, e.g. "Imported from CSV" or "Merged from duplicate record".
toolHelp.task: Creates a task linked to this record. Optionally add a description or mention.
toolHelp.todo_items: Enter tasks — each line = one new task. All will be created at once.
toolHelp.message: Log or send an email, SMS, WhatsApp or chat — pick the channel below.

codeDesc.record_view: See pipeline records (companies, contacts, deals) and open their detail.

codeDesc.team_manage: Create teams and add or remove their members.
codeDesc.role_manage: Create, edit and delete account types (roles) and change their permissions.
codeDesc.billing_manage: Manage subscription, billing details and payment methods.
codeDesc.firm_delete: Permanently delete the entire workspace. Irreversible.
codeDesc.firm_transfer: Transfer workspace ownership to another member.
codeDesc.integrations_manage: Install, configure and remove third-party integrations and plugins.
codeDesc.activity_create: Add activities and notes to a record's streamline.
codeDesc.streamline_view_all: See activities marked as restricted in the streamline as well.
codeDesc.proposal_create: Create and send proposals linked to records.

list.title: Users
list.subtitle: Members of the active firm
list.noAccess: You do not have permission to view users.
list.empty: No users match the selected filters.

detail.title: User detail
detail.subtitle: Firm member profile and activity
detail.noAccess: You do not have permission to view user detail.

timeline.title: Activity timeline
timeline.description: Overview of this member's recent activities. Use filters to quickly narrow down activity type and area.
timeline.empty: No activities found for this user.

actions.title: Actions by permission
actions.description: Update this member's role, expiry date and team assignment.

permissionsSnapshot.title: Permissions snapshot
permissionsSnapshot.description: Summary of explicit permissions currently available to this member.

grantsSnapshot.title: Scope / grants snapshot
grantsSnapshot.noAccess: Owner/admin role is required to view grants detail.

roleWizard.title: New account type
roleWizard.step1Hint: Start from a pre-built account type — you can fine-tune permissions in the next step.
roleWizard.startFromScratchDesc: Create an account type with no preset permissions.
roleWizard.step2Hint: How should the account type appear in the member list?
roleWizard.descriptionPlaceholder: What is this account type for.
roleWizard.identifierHint: A short code with no spaces. Generated automatically from the name.
roleWizard.step3Hint: What can a user with this account type do? Toggle entire groups at once.
roleWizard.failed: Failed to create the account type.

wizard.title: Invite member
wizard.step1Hint: Enter the email address of the person you want to invite to this workspace.
wizard.step2Hint: Select the roles the new member will have and how much of the workspace they can see by default.
wizard.step3Hint: Optionally assign the new member to a team. They can always be reassigned later.
wizard.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
wizard.roleRequired: Please select at least one role.
wizard.noTeams: No teams have been created yet. You can create teams in Settings → Teams.
wizard.scopeCategoryDesc: Can only see records from assigned categories.
wizard.step3HintCategory: Select the categories this member can access.
